name: conv2d-gradient-checking
description: Add numerical gradient checking tests for conv2d backward pass using finite differences. Use when: (1) conv2d_backward shape/value tests pass but numerical correctness is unverified, (2) adding gradient checking coverage for strided, padded, or multi-channel convolutions, (3) extending existing gradient checking test files in a Mojo project with ADR-009 heap corruption constraints.
